data.title: Heidmar Maritime appoints Jagmeet Makkar as Director, with 40 years' experience in shipping ops, comm. management.
data.description: A recent press release dated February 18, 2026, reveals that Heidmar Maritime Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: HMR) appointed Mr. Jagmeet Makkar as Independent Non-executive Director on February 16, 2025. Mr. Makkar, with over 40 years of expertise in shipping operations, commercial management, and risk management, will bring valuable insights to the Company. Alongside this role, he will join the Company’s Audit Committee to contribute to strategic decision-making processes.

data.title: Maxus Mining Inc. (MAXM) lists on OTCQB with symbol MXMGF on Feb 17, 2026, trading shares in Vancouver.
data.description: Vancouver, British Columbia - On February 18, 2026, Maxus Mining Inc. (referred to as "Maxus" or the "Company") made an announcement that pleased investors. The company's common shares, known as "Shares," have started trading on the OTCQB Venture Market as of February 17, 2026. This move is indicated by the symbol "MXMGF" and allows for increased visibility and accessibility for investors. Maxus's shares are now available for trading on the OTCQB platform under the mentioned symbol. The Company's stocks can be accessed through different platforms, including CSE with the ticker symbol MAXM, FRA with R7V, and OTCQB with MXMGF. This development signifies a significant step in expanding the reach of Maxus Mining Inc. and enhancing opportunities for investment in the company.

data.title: Theriva licenses SYN-020 to Rasayana for multiple indications, receiving $300,000 upfront with potential $38M in milestones and royalties on product sales.
data.description: Theriva agreed to a deal that includes a $300,000 initial payment and potential earnings of up to $38 million through development, regulatory, and sales milestones. The agreement also includes tiered single-digit royalties on the net sales of the product.

data.title: Liberty Defense gets contract for HEXWAVE™ System to screen employees & visitors at Infectious Disease Lab.
data.description: An innovative screening system called HEXWAVE’s Advanced Millimeter-Wave & AI will be deployed to screen employees and visitors at a laboratory. This cutting-edge technology combines millimeter-wave technology and artificial intelligence for accurate screening purposes. The system will contribute to enhancing security measures by identifying potential threats effectively. It will be implemented to check both employees and visitors before entering the premises, ensuring a safe environment. This state-of-the-art screening system marks a significant advancement in security measures at the laboratory, benefiting from the technological capabilities of millimeter-wave and AI integration.
aTyr Pharma to showcase at Leerink Partners Global Healthcare Conference.

data.title: 3D Systems introduces 3 new base shades for NextDent Jetted Denture: Dark Pink, Light Pink, and Red Pink, expanding options.
data.description: 3D Systems, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol DDD, disclosed on February 18, 2026, the launch of three additional NextDent® Jet Base shades for their NextDent Jetted Denture Solution in ROCK HILL, S.C. The new shades, namely Dark Pink (DP), Light Pink (LP), and Red Pink (RP), complement the existing NextDent Jet Base LT, resulting in a total of four shades. This range of shades allows dental laboratories to cater to a broader spectrum of natural gum tones, spanning from lighter to deeper and ruddier variations. The extended portfolio equips dental labs to address a more extensive array of patient needs with enhanced confidence. The personalized restorations produced using these shades are not only aesthetically superior but also offer improved fit, comfort, and ultimately, elevate case acceptance rates.

data.title: Greenridge Exploration starts 2026 winter drilling with Denison Mines at Hook-Carter Uranium Project in Saskatchewan.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 18, 2026, Greenridge Exploration Inc. (CSE: GXP | FRA: HW3 | OTCQB: GXPLF) has announced the commencement of the 2026 winter drilling program at the Hook-Carter Uranium Project in the southwestern Athabasca Basin region of Saskatchewan, Canada. The Project is owned 20% by Greenridge and 80% by Denison Mines Corp., with Denison acting as the project's operator. Hook-Carter is situated in an area that includes the Derkson Trend and the Patterson Lake Corridor, known for multiple uranium deposits and showings to the southwest.

data.title: Vasion achieves FedRAMP High Authorization for top government security standard. DISA key supporter.
data.description: Vasion, a prominent serverless printing and Intelligent Print Automation company based in St. George, Utah, disclosed today that it has obtained the FedRAMP® High Authorization to Operate (ATO) via the Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program. This esteemed authorization signifies the highest level of security compliance suitable for government entities. The company expressed gratitude towards DISA for their longstanding support, as they played a vital role in facilitating the achievement of this authorization.

data.title: Hadron Energy to discuss Quality Assurance Program with NRC on Feb. 19, 2026 for Halo Micro-Modular Reactor licensing. Hybrid meeting.
data.description: Hadron Energy, Inc. revealed today that the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) is scheduled to conduct a public meeting on February 19, 2026. The purpose of the meeting is to address the NRC staff's evaluation of Hadron's Quality Assurance Program Description (QAPD) Topical Report related to the Company's Halo Micro-Modular Reactor (MMR) licensing process. The meeting, overseen by the NRC's Office of Nuclear Reactor Regulation, will be a hybrid event allowing both in-person and virtual attendance. No further details were provided.

data.title: AGMH reveals strategic trifecta: RWA tokenization, Kraken servers mass production, MusicDog.ai partnership for AI + Web3.
data.description: AGMH has recently unveiled a strategic trifecta plan, which includes the tokenization of RWA, the mass production of Kraken All-Flash AI servers, and a partnership with MusicDog.ai. This initiative aims to establish a full-stack AI+Web3 ecosystem. Key components of the plan involve implementing tokenization for RWA, ramping up production of Kraken All-Flash AI servers, and collaborating with MusicDog.ai. This strategic move signals AGMH's commitment to advancing in the realms of technology and artificial intelligence.

data.title: CraniUS Therapeutics appoints Johnson & Johnson executive Oray Boston Jr. to Board of Directors. (Character count: 110)
data.description: A healthcare executive with a wealth of commercial and product launch expertise has been appointed to the Board of Directors of CraniUS Therapeutics LLC, a privately owned neurotechnology company. Oray B. Boston Jr. will join the board, bringing valuable experience to the team. The announcement was made in Baltimore on Feb. 18, 2026. This move is seen as a strategic decision as the company looks to leverage Mr. Boston's skills in driving growth and innovation in the neurotechnology sector. The appointment aims to strengthen the board with his knowledge and expertise. This development marks a significant step for CraniUS Therapeutics LLC as they continue to expand and enhance their presence in the industry.

data.title: Beam Global wins 2026 order to provide drone batteries for life-saving purposes, boosting presence in UAV market.
data.description: Beam Global has recently announced a significant order to supply power systems for life-saving drones until 2026. This development has bolstered the company's standing in the swiftly expanding UAV market.

data.title: Wingstop beats Q4 earnings by 19.05%, reports EPS of $1.0 vs. estimate $0.84. Revenue up by $13.87 million.
data.description: Wingstop (NASDAQ: WING) disclosed its Q4 earnings on February 18th, 2026, at 7:45 AM. The company outperformed estimated earnings by 19.05%, presenting an EPS of $1.0 compared to the forecasted $0.84. Revenue witnessed an increase of $13.87 million from the previous year. In the preceding quarter, Wingstop... You can access the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: MEFA shifts U.Plan to Catalis platform; program since '95, marking 30th year. New online launch on Feb 17.
data.description: In Boston, MEFA has revealed that its prepaid tuition program, the U.Plan, will shift to a new platform operated by Catalis, a reputable payment services and SaaS provider well-versed in supporting education savings. This move aligns with the U.Plan's significant achievement, marking its 30th year aiding Massachusetts families since its inception in 1995. The revamped U.Plan platform will launch on February 17th, providing enhanced services for participants.

data.title: Elon Musk's Grok AI is a controversial ChatGPT rival on platform X - a real-time, edgy chatbot sparking controversy.
data.description: Grok is an AI chatbot developed by Elon Musk, integrated into social media platform X. Known for being real-time and edgy, Grok has sparked controversy with its irreverent behavior.

data.title: Sabre's Q4 earnings results for 2025 now available on its Investor Relations website. $SABR posted full year earnings.
data.description: Southlake, TX - On February 18, 2026, Sabre Corporation (NASDAQ: SABR) disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The company has published its earnings release and presentation for both the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on its Investor Relations platform.

data.title: ISSA launches Global Summit in Phoenix, Feb 18, 2026. Aims to unite fitness professionals, students, and educators.
data.description: Phoenix, on February 18, 2026, The International Sports Sciences Association (ISSA), a renowned provider of fitness education and certification worldwide, revealed the initiation of the ISSA Global Summit. This event aims to bring together fitness professionals, students, educators, and industry partners to collaborate and learn.

data.title: Fusion Fuel to acquire 19 high-quality uranium & gas royalties in the Americas from Royal Uranium Inc. in share exchange deal.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, Dublin-based Fusion Fuel Green PLC revealed through a press release that they have finalized an agreement to acquire a majority stake in Royal Uranium Inc. This acquisition includes a diverse range of uranium royalties across exploration and development stages of the mining industry. Fusion Fuel, traded on NASDAQ under symbol HTOO, operates as a comprehensive green energy company, offering engineering, distribution, and sustainable solutions. This move signifies a strategic share exchange deal between the two entities, potentially leading to significant developments in the green energy and mining sectors.
